---
title: "Declaration of AI Use"
format: typst
---

## Declaration

This project used AI assistance (Claude by Anthropic) during the writing and editing process. Specifically, AI was used to:

- Help with brainstorming and coming up with perspectives that the authors might've not immediately came up with
- Help draft, restructure, and refine prose in the individual perspective sections
- Assist with site configuration and technical setup (Quarto, CSS)

All arguments, analyses, and conclusions are the work of the group members. AI-generated text was reviewed, edited, and approved by the respective author of each section. Sources were identified and verified independently by the group.
